subject: Excited to connect at the conference, Nick Wong
body:
Hi Nick Wong,

Saw you'll be at the conference and noticed your work at LinkedIn Marketing .... Would love to swap notes on Marketing, Gtm, Ai, Sales.

[Lightfern will polish this in Gmail]
